inlineContent.text: DotFingersCore is a part of DotFingers framework group which provides components for contactless finger capture and related functionalities which are easy to integrate into an iOS application.

abstract.text: Non-UI component for the fingers auto capture process.
UI component for capturing fingers images with customizable UI.
Static class responsible for generating logs. You can configure log level.
Configuration for components utilizing a camera.
Customization options for the fingers auto capture user interface.
Geometric properties of the preview. All rectangles are defined relative to the preview container.
Indicates how the layer displays video frames.
Result of the finger detection process.
Configuration options for the fingers auto capture process.

This state is active right after the component is created for a short period of time.
Facing of the camera on the device.
The data sample captured at specific time which serves as an input for the fingers auto capture process.
Class responsible for the initialization of IDV libraries -
Configure thresholds for the quality attributes of the fingers auto capture result.
If the threshold property is set to nil, the corresponding quality attribute will not be validated.
Configuration options for the UI Fingers Auto Capture component.
Stateless class which can detect fingers in an image.

The photo-capture sample, supplied in response to a
event during the fingers auto capture process.
This class defines the different states that the UI can be in during the process.
The result returned from the processing of one image during the fingers auto capture process.
Class responsible for the localization of user interface strings.
Configuration of the fingers auto capture non-UI component.
Presets for the quality attributes thresholds of the fingers auto capture result.

method is called and before the process finishes.
